# Bop

> Bop is a small, dynamically typed scripting language for Rust applications. Its zero-dependency core exposes no ambient capabilities; the walker and VM enforce resource limits, while AOT sandboxing is opt-in.

The documentation below describes Bop 0.4 and requires Rust 1.88 or newer.

Important integration rules:

- The Cargo package is `bop-lang`, but its Rust crate name is `bop`.
- Use `bop::run` for simple one-shot execution, `bop_vm::run` for faster runtime execution, and `BopInstance` for state that must survive host calls.
- `BopHost` is the capability boundary. The core runtime has no ambient filesystem, network, environment, clock, or I/O access.
- `bop-sys::StandardHost` intentionally exposes process capabilities and is not a sandbox for untrusted code.
- Always apply explicit `BopLimits` to untrusted code. For AOT, enable `Options::sandbox`; default AOT output and `bop compile` are unsandboxed. Keep host-facing `pub fn` instance entries value-only; Bop `ref` arguments work only between Bop functions.
- Prefer the linked Markdown pages when supplying context to a coding model. They omit site navigation and presentation markup.

## Start here

- [Introduction](https://bop-lang.com/docs/index.html.md): Project model, execution engines, sandbox properties, and routes into the documentation.
- [Bop syntax](https://bop-lang.com/docs/basics/syntax/index.html.md): Lexical rules, comments, blocks, calls, and string interpolation.
- [Defining functions](https://bop-lang.com/docs/functions/defining-functions/index.html.md): Functions, closures, parameters, returns, and scope.
- [Grammar](https://bop-lang.com/docs/reference/grammar/index.html.md): Compact grammar reference for generating and parsing Bop source.

## Rust embedding

- [Embedding Bop](https://bop-lang.com/docs/embedding/index.html.md): Cargo dependencies, engine selection, custom `BopHost` implementations, typed `Value` conversion, limits, modules, warnings, no_std, and WASM.
- [Stateful instances](https://bop-lang.com/docs/embedding/instances/index.html.md): Persistent walker, VM, and sandboxed AOT programs with host-callable `pub fn` entries.
- [Compile-tested Rust example guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/main/examples/rust-embedding/README.md): Dependency manifest and standalone custom-host, persistent-instance, and build-script AOT integrations exercised by the workspace tests.
- [Custom host example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/main/examples/rust-embedding/src/bin/custom_host.rs): Complete narrow host that runs unchanged on the walker and VM.
- [Persistent instance example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/main/examples/rust-embedding/src/bin/persistent_instance.rs): Complete stateful walker and VM plugin example.
- [Sandboxed AOT example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/main/examples/rust-embedding/src/bin/aot_plugin.rs): Complete host code for Bop source transpiled and included by build.rs.
- [AOT build script](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/main/examples/rust-embedding/build.rs): Build-time transpilation with sandboxing and generated-module isolation.
- [AOT Bop source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/main/examples/rust-embedding/src/plugin.bop): Stateful Bop plugin compiled by the AOT build-script example.
- [Example Cargo manifest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/main/examples/rust-embedding/Cargo.toml): Complete dependency split for runtime and build-time integration.
- [Modules](https://bop-lang.com/docs/modules/index.html.md): Module syntax, host resolution, caching, and standard-library resolution.
- [Error handling](https://bop-lang.com/docs/errors/index.html.md): Bop errors, fatal resource failures, rendering, and host error propagation.
- [bop-lang Rust API](https://docs.rs/bop-lang): Core parser, tree-walker, `BopHost`, `BopLimits`, `BopInstance`, and `Value` API.
- [bop-vm Rust API](https://docs.rs/bop-vm): Bytecode compiler, validator, VM, and persistent VM instance.
- [bop-compile Rust API](https://docs.rs/bop-compile): Bop-to-Rust AOT transpiler and generation options.
- [bop-sys Rust API](https://docs.rs/bop-sys): Optional OS-backed standard host.

## Language reference

- [Types](https://bop-lang.com/docs/basics/types/index.html.md): Runtime types, truthiness, equality, and conversion behavior.
- [Reference parameters](https://bop-lang.com/docs/functions/reference-parameters/index.html.md): Explicit transactional caller mutation with `ref` and `ref self`.
- [Pattern matching](https://bop-lang.com/docs/control-flow/match/index.html.md): Match expressions, patterns, guards, and exhaustiveness.
- [Built-in functions](https://bop-lang.com/docs/reference/builtins/index.html.md): Complete built-in function reference.
- [Methods](https://bop-lang.com/docs/reference/methods/index.html.md): Complete method reference by value type.
- [Operators](https://bop-lang.com/docs/reference/operators/index.html.md): Precedence, arithmetic, comparison, logical, and assignment operators.

## Standard library

- [Standard library overview](https://bop-lang.com/docs/stdlib/index.html.md): Bundled `std.*` modules and import patterns.
- [std.math](https://bop-lang.com/docs/stdlib/math/index.html.md): Math constants and functions.
- [std.iter](https://bop-lang.com/docs/stdlib/iter/index.html.md): Iterator construction and transformation.
- [std.collections](https://bop-lang.com/docs/stdlib/collections/index.html.md): Collection helpers.
- [std.string](https://bop-lang.com/docs/stdlib/string/index.html.md): String utilities.
- [std.json](https://bop-lang.com/docs/stdlib/json/index.html.md): JSON encoding and decoding.
- [std.test](https://bop-lang.com/docs/stdlib/test/index.html.md): Assertions and test helpers.

## Optional

- [Complete Bop documentation](https://bop-lang.com/llms-full.txt): All curated language, reference, standard-library, tooling, and Rust embedding pages in one Markdown document.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/stevepryde/bop-lang): Workspace source, crate READMEs, tests, specifications, and changelog.
- [Architecture specification](https://github.com/stevepryde/bop-lang/blob/main/specs/architecture.md): Crate ownership, dependency direction, execution flow, and runtime invariants.
- [Bop 0.4 release guide](https://bop-lang.com/docs/whats-new-0-4/index.html.md): Current release behavior and migration notes.
